channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This ancient crocodile relative grew up on four legs then walked on two
item.description: A bizarre crocodile relative from the age of dinosaurs is rewriting what scientists thought they knew about ancient reptiles. This poodle-sized creatu...

item.title: This simple fatty acid could restore failing vision
item.description: Scientists at UC Irvine have found a way to potentially reverse age-related vision loss by targeting the ELOVL2 “aging gene” and restoring vital fatty...

item.title: 289-million-year-old mummified reptile reveals how breathing began on land
item.description: A remarkably preserved, mummified reptile from 289 million years ago is rewriting what we know about how animals first breathed on land. This tiny cre...

item.title: Scientists discover hidden forces are warping Earth deep beneath the surface
item.description: Scientists have mapped how Earth’s deepest mantle is being deformed—and the results point to long-lost tectonic plates buried thousands of kilometers ...

item.title: For the first time, scientists pinpoint the brain cells behind depression
item.description: Scientists have identified two specific types of brain cells that behave differently in people with depression, offering a clearer picture of what is ...

item.title: Podcast: Increasing domestic critical minerals supplies
item.description: Critical minerals play an essential role in modern technologies, and a domestic supply is essential for national security. Elizabeth Holley discusses ...

item.title: Podcast: The future of quantum computing
item.description: The future of quantum information science and engineering promises computers with unprecedented speed and capabilities. Mikhail Lukin, an NSF-supporte...

item.title: NSF announces 2026 Graduate Research Fellowship Program award offers
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF) today announced that it has made offers and will award 2,500 Graduate Research Fellowships for the 2026-202...

item.title: Podcast: AI-powered labs accelerating scientific discovery
item.description: U.S. National Science Foundation-supported engineers are developing a bold new vision for chemical and materials discovery. Milad Abolhasani, a profes...

item.title: NSF initiative aims to make every American worker, business and community AI-ready
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced a new funding opportunity as part of an effort to enable all Americans to understand, apply and create ...
